# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We take the security of this software supply chain and application lifecycle
seriously. Currently, we provide security patches and active support
**exclusively for versions >= 1.5**.

| Version Line | Security Support       | Status            |
| ------------ | ---------------------- | ----------------- |
| `>= 1.5.x`   | :white_check_mark: Yes | Active            |
| `< 1.5.0`    | :x: No                 | End of Life (EOL) |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do **NOT** report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues.
Instead, utilize the private GitHub Security Advisory feature or contact the
security team directly. We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and provide
a timeline for mitigation and patching.
